extra.reason: Completed public-release leak assessment: scanned current tree, ignored files, dist zip, Git history/metadata, secrets/PII/org endpoints; no high-confidence committed secrets found, but publication should wait for sanitizing org-specific endpoints/identity/tooling and adding public metadata.
